ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the system */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the company went public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock prices */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price to account for splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid out on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_logs" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "trade_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the trade */,
  "trade_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the trade */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjusted price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid out on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the price adjustment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the price history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_histories_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (price increase/decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the alert */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index at inception */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the index value was last updated */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)
